name: KZL
overview: Putra became a victim of fraud from an online store. Putra shared his experience on social media Instagram and began to learn that many people experienced the same thing. On the other hand, Annisa is a friend who always helps Putra in dealing with all problems, including the fraud problem. With the fraud case experienced by Putra, they both try to uncover a crime case involving an online store with a certain mode. Not only that, they are also interested in sharing videos that are popular in cyberspace, such as depression and bullying.

trailers.title: Trailer "Viu Original KZL" | Starring Julian Jacob, Fathia Izzati
